content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.37% with banks/realty weak but Auto/Metal/Pharma positive. Strong sector rotation visible — defense (HAL +6.5%), capital goods (BHEL +6.3%), ports (ADANIPORTS +4.7%) leading on Q4 earnings momentum. VIX at 18 suggests moderate caution. With 50 minutes to close, focus is on position management, not new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23880,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD — keeping SL at 1029 (already above entry, locks in +4.6% on 80 shares). CMP 1045 sits 1.6% above SL which respects the 1% trail-gap rule. Thesis intact: ICICI Sec Buy Rs 1350, Q4 PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%. Not tightening further to avoid forced exit on intraday chop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge intact. Gold at $4,613/oz with JPM target $5,000 by Q4. SL at 119 is 2.6% below CMP 122.19 — appropriate room. -2.3% drawdown is within absorption budget. Hold as portfolio diversifier."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +2.1% but SL already at 1715 (entry +0.9%, breakeven+). CMP 1735.70, SL 1715 = 1.2% gap, respects trail-gap floor. ATH breakout, Q4 +9% PAT, 500 MMT cargo milestone, MOFSL Buy 1900. Holding SL where it is — letting position breathe given high momentum."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.6% with SL at 13400 (0.6% below CMP 13480). Tight already; trailing further would force-exit on noise. April record sales +33% YoY supports thesis but Q4 PAT -6.5% margin compression is the offset. Will let SL handle it — risk is well-defined at -3% from entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "new_target": 220.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock recovered to +3.9% intraday, now at 207.49 (-0.8% from entry 209). 52-week high broke today. SL at 204 (1.7% below CMP) — appropriate gap. Q4 PAT +68%, Emkay target 220 confirms our target. Keeping SL — no tighten because position is barely in the green and intraday wobble would force exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4555.00,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.8% unrealized, SL at 4555 (1.3% below CMP 4619.90) — respects trail-gap floor. Defense theme strong, 31% 1-month rally. Q4 results May 14 is 7 sessions out (NOT in 3-session binary window today). Keeping SL — too small a gain to tighten without forcing exit. Will reassess closer to results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.3% with SL 372 (0.8% below CMP 374.55). Already tight. Q4 PAT +156%, ATH today on Rs 75,000 cr order book. Thesis intact, intraday faded from 388 high to 374 — letting SL play out. Cannot tighten without violating 1% gap rule."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +125% reported TODAY (binary event behind us, +ve), pre-sales record Rs 8,135 cr, net debt negative. Stock gapped to 1577 high then faded to 1458 — typical sell-the-news. SL at 1420 (2.6% below CMP) appropriate. Concall at 5 PM may add direction. Hold through close."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4% unrealized, SL at 6850 (2.1% below CMP 6996). FY26 EBITDA +103%, margin +992bps, 7.7x volume signals institutional accumulation. Approaching 52w high 7200. SL appropriate — won't tighten until +2% threshold. Strong setup, let it run."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at +4.6% lock-in; CMP 1045/SL 1029 = 1.6% gap respects trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge; -2.3% within absorption budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+; 1.2% gap to CMP appropriate for momentum stock."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 13400.00,
      "reasoning": "SL tight at 0.6% below CMP; further tighten would force-exit on noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "reasoning": "Stock recovering to entry; 1.7% SL gap appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4555.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 14 (7 sessions out, not in binary window). Defense rally intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 372.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already 0.8% below CMP — cannot tighten further without breaching gap rule."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1420.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 catalyst behind us, strong print. Sell-the-news fade typical; SL room appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6850.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong volume accumulation, +1.4% not yet at trail threshold."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "CAMS (+8% on Q4 beat, 68% RTA share, record EBITDA margin) — strong setup but late in session, will revisit Day 17 for swing entry on a pullback to 770-780. HAL/BHEL/ADANIPORTS already represented in book; not stacking capital-goods/defense cluster (held HAL+BHEL = 2 capital goods names — one more would trigger cluster cap). MEESHO has Q4 results May 6 (1 session = binary window) — NO new entry. NIFTYBEES neutral, no edge over selective single names today. COLPAL/GOLDBEES adequate defensive coverage already.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-positioned: 9 holdings across financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK), defense/capgoods (HAL, BHEL), ports (ADANIPORTS), auto (MARUTI), realty (SOBHA), chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), gold hedge (GOLDBEES). Deployed 49% with INR 517K cash — under soft target but appropriate given India VIX 18, US markets weak (S&P -0.41%, Dow -1.13%), 50min to close. No new entries: time-of-day risk, no qualifying setup with conviction >= 0.65 that isn't already represented. Cluster discipline: 2 capital-goods names is the limit; 2 financials limit. Daily P&L +0.36% steady. Priority next session: re-examine PNBHOUSING for partial book at 1070-1085 R1/R2 levels, watch BANDHANBNK breakout follow-through, reassess MARUTI thesis if it loses 13400 SL."
}
